_papers: arxiv:2411.12990 — BetterBench: Assessing AI Benchmarks (NeurIPS 2024 Spotlight, Stanford)
arxiv:2407.04065 — LBOps: Workflows and Smells of Leaderboard Operations (IEEE TSE 2025, SAIL/Queen's)
_methodology: BetterBench scores from 46-criteria assessment across 5 lifecycle stages; LBOps operational smell analysis across 711 leaderboards

gpqa_diamond.notes: Highest-scoring benchmark. PhD-level science questions. Expert-validated.

chatbot_arena.notes: Human preference Elo. Continuous fresh data from live users.

livebench.notes: Monthly-refreshed questions. Already covered via Epoch AI data.

swe_bench.notes: Real GitHub issues. Verified subset is higher quality.

math_level_5.notes: Competition-level math. Some contamination risk from training data.

mmlu_pro.notes: Lowest-scoring major benchmark. High contamination risk. Still widely reported.

aa_intelligence_index.notes: Composite of 10 evaluations, 95% CI < ±1%. Not in original BetterBench study but meets high-quality criteria.
